evidence: gh run view 26782446769: '🎭 Level 4: E2E Tests in 20m24s' - step 'Install Playwright browsers' cancelled after 20+ minutes
Root cause: no browser cache, no timeout, downloading all browsers on every run
Fix: added actions/cache@v4 for ~/.cache/ms-playwright, changed install to chromium-only with --with-deps, added timeout-minutes: 10
